meta.fixed: sleeve definitions + rule parameters + inverse-vol risk-parity (126d lookback, 21d rebalance, decisions lagged one bar)
meta.moves: allocator weights (monthly) and the line items inside the two rule-based sleeves (21d rebalance)
meta.caveat: equity_mom universe is a hand-curated 47-name thematic list (docs/07) -- a registered selection-bias source; ~11% weight; TR-11 downgraded that sleeve to 'momentum = beta'

equity_mom.rule: 科技/AI 動能輪動(規則,持股每月換)

defensive.rule: 防禦性雙動能輪動(規則,持股每月換)

lev_trend.rule: 趨勢閘門 TQQQ(單一標的,開/關)

gold.rule: 黃金 GLD(單一標的,買進持有)

bonds.rule: 美債 IEF(單一標的,買進持有)
